headline: Risk-on holds; desk pivots to tanker/bank/biotech — space names (SPCE -32%, ASTS -14%, SATS -12%) getting crushed

market_state.line: SPY +0.55%, QQQ +0.8%, both above 50d, VXX stress 0.96 — vol suppressed, tape supportive for entries; no macro events on deck.

actions.line: Full size — all three advisors aligned, clean technicals, risk-on tail; 2.0R setup.
Half size — signal + risk agree; research neutral, no catalyst; 2.0R but capped conviction.
Quarter size only — thin volume limits conviction; signal/research neutral; 2.7R if it works.

watch.line: SATS -12%, rel vol 5.7x — unusual volume flags a real catalyst; watch for bounce or continuation setup.
LEN -4.9% on Q2 earnings miss — homebuilder weakness; watch sector read-through.
Medium-confidence bullish ripple from COHR/SpaceX IPO narrative — rad-hard/RF defense supply play not yet priced.
Two-sided risk: bullish satellite-economy halo vs. Starlink IoT competitive pressure — net direction uncertain.
SPCE -31.5%, MACD bearish, rel vol 1.8x — possible dead-cat watch if volume spikes further.

changed: Desk takes fully rotated — NUAI, COMP, TER gone; DHT, DB, RLAY are new picks.
ARM tech leadership gone; space sector now the dominant theme via mass selling (SPCE, ASTS, SATS, ASTS).
caveats: RTH scan as of 14:10 ET 2026-06-12; prices and levels are scan-time snapshots — spreads and fills may differ at execution.
